violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The sliding doors to the outside, located in the (front area), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The Ice Well at the bar is lacking a proper air gap (Currently the flexible tube is set into the drain as an air break). Flexible tube is to be adjusted so that a direct connection does not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food (ice) is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2025
